commands.name: audit
commands.purpose: Flagship. Run gate with snapshot; score 4 dims (0–4 each) → P0–P3 severity; report drift with file:line; trend across last 3 snapshots; judgment pass; no edits.

commands.name: migrate
commands.purpose: Convert legacy raw-CSS / hex / hand-rolled UI into Fuselage + token refs; map by role, not value; gate closes

commands.name: upgrade
commands.purpose: Hop-by-hop version bump; gate detects breaks; resolver diff maps renames; checkpoint per hop

commands.name: polish
commands.purpose: Final pre-ship pass: reads audit snapshot (STOP if missing); drains P0 backlog; re-runs gate + reads trend; code hygiene; visual rhythm.

commands.name: harden
commands.purpose: Production-readiness: edge cases, i18n, RTL, logical spacing, input validation, performance resilience, a11y — all through Fuselage; handoff to polish.

commands.name: critique
commands.purpose: UX heuristic review: hierarchy, cognitive load, IA, affordances, a11y. HIGH/MED/LOW scored findings. Snapshot + suppression + trend. No code, no gate.

commands.name: clarify
commands.purpose: Fix UX copy: labels, button text, errors, helper text, empty states. STOP to confirm audience + mental state; NEVER list enforced; handoff to polish on green.

commands.name: adapt
commands.purpose: Replace literal media queries with `useBreakpoints`/`useMediaQuery`; source-context audit; logical spacing; honors `usePrefersReducedMotion`; handoff to polish.

commands.name: shape
commands.purpose: Discovery interview (≥1 Q-round, STOP if ambiguous) + Fuselage composition tree + token/state plan. STOP after output — no product code.

commands.name: craft
commands.purpose: Shape-confirm ≠ code-green (second STOP for token/state plan); build with Fuselage only — NEVER hand-roll; all states; gate closes; visual loop; user summary.
